subcommands.name: render
subcommands.description: Render media on Lambda

options.description: How many times a chunk can be retried before the render times out
How many frames should be rendered per chunk
Pass input props as filename or as JSON
Run Chrome in normal mode rather than headless
User agent to use for Chrome during rendering
Disable CORS and other web security features
Concurrency with which each Lambda function should render
Overwrite a video if it already exists in the S3 bucket
Name of the function that should be invoked
Use a different function to render the video. By default, use the same function as the one to start the render
The time in milisecond that a delayRender() may take before it times out
Quality for rendered frames, JPEG only, 0-100
Upscale or downscale or the dimensions of the video
Codec to be used for the audio
Render only every nth frame (only for GIFs)
How many times a GIF should loop. 0 = No loop
Customize the output video bitrate. Mutually exclusive with --crf
FFMPEG CRF value, controls quality, see docs for info
Render a portion or a still of a video, 0-9, 50
ProRes profile, need --codec=prores to be set
Presets balance encoding speed and compression quality, with slower presets achieving better compression. Needs --codec=h264 to be set
Format to render the frames in, "jpeg" or "png"
Custom pixel format, see docs for available values
Custom location for a Remotion config file

args.description: URL or name of the site

args.name: out-name
args.description: Where the output should be downloaded. No download it omitted

Disable CORS and other web security features
The time in milisecond that a delayRender() may take before it times out
Quality for rendered frames, JPEG only, 0-100
Upscale or downscale or the dimensions of the video
Codec to be used for the audio
Render only every nth frame (only for GIFs)
How many times a GIF should loop. 0 = No loop
Customize the output video bitrate. Mutually exclusive with --crf
FFMPEG CRF value, controls quality, see docs for info
Render a portion or a still of a video, 0-9, 50
ProRes profile, need --codec=prores to be set
Presets balance encoding speed and compression quality, with slower presets achieving better compression. Needs --codec=h264 to be set

Custom pixel format, see docs for available values
How many frames to render in parallel
Include an audio track even if it's silent
Collect information that you can submit to Remotion if asked for a reproduction
Specify a location for a dotenv file
Overwrite if file exists, default true
Enable Chrome browser extensions while rendering
Cache webpack bundle, boolean, default true
Custom port to use for the HTTP server
